Table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Card of table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Name

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Code

RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

'---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROWS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

SELECT distinct

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_ABSOLUTE AS TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_CURRENCYCODE AS TAX_CURRENCY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_ENDTIME AS TAX_END_TIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_PRICEGROUPCODE AS TAX_PRICE_GROUP_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_STARTTIME AS TAX_START_TIME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE AS TAX_CODE_BK,

events_products_taxRows_tax_absolute AS TAX_ADDITIONAL_ABSOLUTE_FLAG,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CURRENCYCODE AS TAX_ADDITIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_TAX_NAME_EN AS TAX_NAME,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_TAX_VALUE AS TAX_VALUE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE AS USER_GROUP_CODE_BK,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_VALUE AS TAX_ROW_VALUE,

__LOAD_TS AS VALID_FROM

FROM DB_CONS_STG_PRD.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROWS

 

 

-----------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE

Primary key(s) Target: COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, TAX_CODE_BK, USER_GROUP_CODE_BK

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD2

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER


Check constraint name of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

CKT_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG


Server validation rule of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

drop table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW (
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
TAX_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
USER_GROUP_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT not null,
TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG FLAG,
TAX_CURRENCY_CODE TEXT,
TAX_END_TIME TIME,
TAX_PRICE_GROUP_CODE TEXT,
TAX_START_TIME TIME,
TAX_ADDITIONAL_ABSOLUTE_FLAG FLAG,
TAX_ADDITIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE TEXT,
TAX_NAME TEXT,
TAX_VALUE DECIMAL,
TAX_ROW_VALUE DECIMAL,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG FLAG not null,
constraint PK_RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_ primary key (COUNTRY_CODE_BK, PRODUCT_CODE_BK, TAX_CODE_BK, USER_GROUP_CODE_BK)
not enforced
);

alter table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW set comment = 'Reference data entity capturing tax assignments to a product, including tax codes, values, currency, time validity, and user group codes, to support country- or segment-specific tax management for the product.';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_CODE_BK is
'Tax Code (events_products_taxRows_tax_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.USER_GROUP_CODE_BK is
'Tax User Group Code (events_products_taxRows_userGroupCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG is
'Tax Absolute (events_products_taxRows_tax_absolute )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_CURRENCY_CODE is
'Tax Tax Currency Code (events_products_taxRows_tax_currencyCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_END_TIME is
'Tax End Time (events_products_taxRows_endTime )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_PRICE_GROUP_CODE is
'Tax Price Group Code (events_products_taxRows_priceGroupCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_START_TIME is
'Tax Start Time (events_products_taxRows_startTime )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_ADDITIONAL_ABSOLUTE_FLAG is
'Tax Absolute (events_products_taxRows_tax_absolute )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_ADDITIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE is
'Tax Tax Currency Code (events_products_taxRows_tax_currencyCode )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_NAME is
'Tax Name (EN) (events_products_taxRows_tax_name_en )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_VALUE is
'Tax Value (events_products_taxRows_tax_value )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.TAX_ROW_VALUE is
'Tax Row Value (events_products_taxRows_value )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.VALID_FROM is
'It indicates from when the record is active (VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. )';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.VALID_TO is
'It indicates till when the record is Active (VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it''s derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31)';

comment on column RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'It indicates if the record is active (ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.)';

Column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Card of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Name

VALID_FROM

Code

VALID_FROM

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

VALID_FROM: Indicates the dattime when the validity of the record starts. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS.


Check constraint name of the column VALID_FROM of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. As it is SCD Type 2 it's derived from the __LOAD_TS. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31


Check constraint name of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Card of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

BOOLEAN

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.


Check constraint name of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_HYBRIS_PRODUCT_CATALOG_TAX_ROW
